CustomField.description: Summary of Notification work item execution status with sent/failure counts.
CustomField.formula: IF(TotalNotificationsPlanned__c = 0, "", IF(TotalNotificationsPlanned__c = TotalNotificationsProcessed__c && TotalNotificationsSent__c = TotalNotificationsProcessed__c, "✅ " & TEXT(TotalNotificationsSent__c) & " sent", IF(TotalNotificationsProcessed__c > 0 && TotalNotificationsSent__c = 0, "❌ " & TEXT(TotalNotificationsProcessed__c) & " failed", IF(TotalNotificationsProcessed__c = 0, "⏸️ " & TEXT(TotalNotificationsPlanned__c) & " planned, not executed", "⚠️ " & TEXT(TotalNotificationsSent__c) & "/" & TEXT(TotalNotificationsPlanned__c) & " sent" & IF(TotalNotificationsProcessed__c - TotalNotificationsSent__c > 0, " (" & TEXT(TotalNotificationsProcessed__c - TotalNotificationsSent__c) & " failed" & IF(TotalNotificationsPlanned__c - TotalNotificationsProcessed__c > 0, ", " & TEXT(TotalNotificationsPlanned__c - TotalNotificationsProcessed__c) & " not executed)", ")" ), IF(TotalNotificationsPlanned__c - TotalNotificationsProcessed__c > 0, " (" & TEXT(TotalNotificationsPlanned__c - TotalNotificationsProcessed__c) & " not executed)", "" ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Summary of Notification work item execution status.
CustomField.label: Notification Summary
